stages.native:
WITH latest AS (
  SELECT max(season::int) AS latest_season
  FROM public.membership_packages
), current_display AS (
  SELECT trim(category) AS category, min(display_order) AS display_order
  FROM public.membership_packages p
  CROSS JOIN latest l
  WHERE p.season = l.latest_season::text
    AND trim(category) <> 'Pavilion Key'
    AND trim(category) <> ''
    AND category IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY trim(category)
), previous_display AS (
  SELECT trim(category) AS category, min(display_order) AS display_order
  FROM public.membership_packages p
  CROSS JOIN latest l
  WHERE p.season = (l.latest_season - 1)::text
    AND trim(category) <> 'Pavilion Key'
    AND trim(category) <> ''
    AND category IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY trim(category)
), current_counts AS (
  SELECT trim(p.category) AS category, count(*)::int AS current_year
  FROM public.raw_members m
  JOIN public.membership_packages p
    ON m."Membership" = p.name
  JOIN latest l
    ON p.season = l.latest_season::text
  WHERE trim(p.category) <> 'Pavilion Key'
    AND trim(p.category) <> ''
    AND p.category IS NOT NULL
    AND m."Payment" IN ('Paid', 'Part Paid')
    AND coalesce(m.is_current, true) = true
  GROUP BY trim(p.category)
), previous_counts AS (
  SELECT
    h.membership AS category,
    CASE format('%s/%s', l.latest_season - 1, l.latest_season)
      WHEN '2026/2027' THEN h."2026/2027"
      WHEN '2025/2026' THEN h."2025/2026"
      WHEN '2024/2025' THEN h."2024/2025"
      WHEN '2023/2024' THEN h."2023/2024"
      WHEN '2022/2023' THEN h."2022/2023"
      WHEN '2021/2022' THEN h."2021/2022"
      WHEN '2020/2021' THEN h."2020/2021"
      WHEN '2019/2020' THEN h."2019/2020"
      WHEN '2018/2019' THEN h."2018/2019"
      WHEN '2017/2018' THEN h."2017/2018"
      WHEN '2016/2017' THEN h."2016/2017"
      WHEN '2015/2016' THEN h."2015/2016"
      WHEN '2014/2015' THEN h."2014/2015"
    END::int AS previous_year
  FROM public.membership_history h
  CROSS JOIN latest l
  WHERE h.membership NOT IN ('Total', 'Pavilion Key')
), categories AS (
  SELECT category FROM current_counts
  UNION
  SELECT category FROM previous_counts
)
SELECT
  c.category,
  coalesce(prev.previous_year, 0)::int AS "Previous Year",
  coalesce(cur.current_year, 0)::int AS "Current Year"
FROM categories c
LEFT JOIN current_counts cur ON cur.category = c.category
LEFT JOIN previous_counts prev ON prev.category = c.category
LEFT JOIN current_display cd ON cd.category = c.category
LEFT JOIN previous_display pd ON pd.category = c.category
ORDER BY coalesce(cd.display_order, pd.display_order, 999), c.category;
